ast.target: 仅从场景笔记中提取“内容”部分，移除“节拍”、“节拍表”和其他元数据部分。非常适合小说导出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Headers that mark content sections (comma-separated). Will extract text after these headers.
ast.target: 标记内容部分的标题（逗号分隔）。将提取这些标题之后的文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Headers to exclude (comma-separated). Text under these will be removed.
ast.target: 要排除的标题（逗号分隔）。这些标题下的文本将被移除。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The markdown header level used for sections (1-6)
ast.target: 用于部分的 Markdown 标题级别（1-6）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If no Content section found, use all text (after removing excluded sections)
ast.target: 如果未找到“内容”部分，则使用所有文本（在移除排除的部分之后）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Extracts Beat Sheet and Beats sections from scene notes for outline/planning compilation.
ast.target: 从场景笔记中提取“节拍表”和“节拍”部分，用于大纲/规划编译。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 标记节拍部分的标题（逗号分隔）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add scene name as header before beats
ast.target: 在节拍之前添加场景名称作为标题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Format for scene name header. $name = scene name
ast.target: 场景名称标题的格式。$name = 场景名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text to show if no beats found (leave empty to skip scene)
ast.target: 如果未找到节拍则显示的文本（留空则跳过场景）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Removes metadata, notes, and formatting artifacts for clean prose output
ast.target: 移除元数据、笔记和格式化痕迹，以获得干净的正文输出。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 移除 Obsidian 引用块（> [!note] 等）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 将多个空格/换行符转换为单个。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wraps the manuscript content in a customizable template structure
ast.target: 将手稿内容包装在可自定义的模板结构中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a table of contents before the content

ast.name: description
ast.source: Strips all markdown formatting for a plain text output
ast.target: 移除所有Markdown格式，输出纯文本

ast.name: description
ast.target: 保留标题文本（不带#符号）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add indentation to start of paragraphs

ast.name: description
ast.source: Replaces varied scene break markers with a consistent separator
ast.target: 将不同的场景分隔标记替换为统一的分隔符

ast.name: description
ast.source: The separator to use (use \n for newlines)
ast.target: 要使用的分隔符（使用\\n表示换行）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of blank lines before/after separator
ast.target: 分隔符前后的空行数量

ast.name: description
ast.source: Saves the compiled manuscript as a Markdown file in the vault
ast.target: 将编译后的手稿保存为Markdown文件到保险库中

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path relative to story folder. $1 = story title, $2 = draft name, $date = current date
ast.target: 相对于故事文件夹的路径。$1 = 故事标题，$2 = 草稿名称，$date = 当前日期

ast.name: description
ast.source: Open the exported file in a new pane
ast.target: 在新窗格中打开导出的文件

ast.name: description
ast.source: Saves the compiled manuscript as an HTML file
ast.target: 将编译后的手稿保存为HTML文件

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path for the HTML file. $1 = story title
ast.target: HTML文件的路径。$1 = 故事标题

ast.name: description
ast.source: Embed basic CSS styling in the HTML

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wrap content in complete HTML activeDocument structure
ast.target: 将内容包装在完整的HTML活动文档结构中

ast.name: description
ast.source: Apply a custom regex find-and-replace pattern
ast.target: 应用自定义的正则表达式查找和替换模式

ast.name: description
ast.target: 要查找的正则表达式模式

ast.name: description
ast.source: Replacement text ($1, $2, etc. for capture groups)
ast.target: 替换文本（$1, $2等用于捕获组）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Regex flags (g = global, i = case-insensitive, m = multiline)
ast.target: 正则表达式标志（g = 全局，i = 不区分大小写，m = 多行）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Removes framework/tool headers like "Content", "Beat Sheet", etc. that are internal to the plugin structure
ast.target: 移除插件结构内部的框架/工具标题，如“内容”、“节拍表”等

ast.name: description
ast.source: Comma-separated list of headers to strip (e.g., "Content,Beat Sheet,Notes")
ast.target: 要移除的标题的逗号分隔列表（例如，“内容,节拍表,笔记”）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The markdown header level to check (1-6)

ast.name: description
ast.target: 区分大小写地匹配标题

ast.name: description
ast.source: Clean story text for beta readers (no tool headers or notes)
ast.target: 为测试读者清理故事文本（无工具标题或笔记）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Structured draft with chapters/scenes for editing in Word/Docs
ast.target: 结构化草稿，包含章节/场景，适用于在Word/Docs中编辑

ast.name: description
ast.source: Beat sheet / outline for plotting and revision
ast.target: 节拍表/大纲，用于情节构思和修订

ast.name: description
ast.target: 用于查询包的浓缩摘要

ast.name: description
ast.source: Formatted for printing or PDF export

ast.name: description
ast.source: Everything, including framework headers and metadata
ast.target: 包含所有内容，包括框架标题和元数据

ast.name: description
ast.source: Exports with chapter headers only - no scene titles. Format: Chapter Number, Chapter Name, Content
ast.target: 仅导出章节标题 - 无场景标题。格式：章节编号，章节名称，内容

ast.name: description
ast.source: Clean book format: extracts only Content sections, organized by chapter. Removes Beats, Beat Sheet, and notes.
ast.target: 清洁的书籍格式：仅提取内容部分，按章节组织。移除节拍、节拍表和笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compiles Beat Sheet and Beats sections from all scenes, organized by chapter. Perfect for reviewing story structure.
ast.target: 从所有场景中编译节拍表和节拍部分，按章节组织。非常适合审视故事结构。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Minimal formatting - chapter headers and clean prose text only
ast.target: 最小化格式 - 仅包含章节标题和干净的散文文本

ast.name: description
ast.source: Exports as plain text with no markdown formatting

ast.name: description
ast.source: Exports as a styled HTML activeDocument for web viewing or conversion
ast.target: 导出为带样式的HTML活动文档，用于网页查看或转换

ast.name: description
ast.source: A complete medieval fantasy kingdom with castle, noble houses, city watch, merchants guild, and elemental magic system. Perfect for starting a high fantasy story.
ast.target: 一个完整的中世纪奇幻王国，拥有城堡、贵族家族、城市守卫、商人公会和元素魔法系统。非常适合开始一个高奇幻故事。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Graceful and politically astute royal consort. Known for her diplomatic skills and charity work.
ast.target: 优雅且政治敏锐的王后。以其外交技巧和慈善工作而闻名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Young heir to the throne, eager to prove himself but still learning the weight of leadership.
ast.target: 年轻的王位继承人，渴望证明自己，但仍在学习领导的重担。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Grizzled veteran military leader. Commands the kingdom's armies with tactical brilliance.
ast.target: 饱经风霜的资深军事领袖。以卓越的战术才能指挥王国军队。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Mysterious and powerful mage who advises the king on magical matters and threats.
ast.target: 神秘而强大的法师，就魔法事务和威胁向国王提供建议。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Noble lady from an ancient bloodline. Manages extensive estates and has considerable political influence.
ast.target: 来自古老血统的贵族女士。管理着广阔的庄园，拥有相当大的政治影响力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Skilled captain of the City Watch. Maintains order in the capital with firm but fair hand.
ast.target: 技艺高超的城市守卫队长。以坚定而公正的手腕维持首都的秩序。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gentle priest who tends to the spiritual needs of the people and the royal family.
ast.target: 温和的牧师，照料人民和王室的精神需求。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Renowned craftsman whose weapons and armor are sought throughout the realm.
ast.target: 著名的工匠，其武器和盔甲在整个王国都备受追捧。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shrewd leader of the Merchants Guild. Controls much of the kingdom's trade and commerce.
ast.target: 精明的商人公会领袖。控制着王国大部分的贸易和商业。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Friendly tavern keeper who hears all the gossip and news in the kingdom.
ast.target: 友善的酒馆老板，能听到王国里所有的流言蜚语和新闻。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A hooded figure recently arrived in the kingdom. Their purpose and identity remain unknown.
ast.target: 一个最近抵达王国的戴兜帽的身影。其目的和身份仍不得而知。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The magnificent seat of power for House Stormhaven. Towering walls of grey stone overlook the capital city.
ast.target: 斯托姆黑文家族宏伟的权力中心。高耸的灰色石墙俯瞰着首都。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Grand hall where the king holds court. High vaulted ceilings, stained glass windows, and the ancient Throne of Arendor.
ast.target: 国王举行宫廷会议的大厅。高耸的拱形天花板、彩色玻璃窗和古老的阿伦多尔王座。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vast collection of books, scrolls, and magical tomes. The wizard Merrick spends much of his time here.
ast.target: 庞大的书籍、卷轴和魔法典籍收藏。法师梅里克大部分时间都在这里度过。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bustling center of commerce. Merchants, craftsmen, and traders from across the realm gather here.
ast.target: 繁华的商业中心。来自王国各地的商人、工匠和贸易商聚集于此。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Popular tavern and inn. Common ground for nobles and commoners alike. Known for good ale and better gossip.
ast.target: 受欢迎的酒馆兼旅馆。贵族和平民的共同去处。以好啤酒和更好的流言蜚语而闻名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ancient forest to the east. Beautiful but mysterious, with rumors of magical creatures and hidden ruins.
ast.target: 东部的古老森林。美丽而神秘，有传言说这里有魔法生物和隐藏的废墟。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Crumbling fortress from a forgotten age. Recently, strange lights and sounds have been reported here.
ast.target: 来自被遗忘时代的摇摇欲坠的堡垒。最近，这里报告了奇怪的灯光和声音。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Military outpost guarding the kingdom's northern frontier. Recently reinforced due to increased raids.
ast.target: 守卫王国北部边境的军事前哨。由于袭击增加，最近得到了加强。

ast.name: description
ast.source: King Aldric's coronation ceremony 24 years ago. The beginning of an era of peace and prosperity.
ast.target: 24年前奥尔德里克国王的加冕典礼。一个和平与繁荣时代的开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Raiders from the north attacked the border fort. The attack was repelled but revealed concerning coordination.
ast.target: 来自北方的袭击者袭击了边境堡垒。袭击被击退，但显示出令人担忧的协调性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Annual celebration of the harvest. The capital fills with music, food, and festivities.
ast.target: 一年一度的丰收庆典。首都充满了音乐、美食和欢庆活动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Strange magical phenomena detected at Shadowkeep ruins. The Court Wizard investigates.
ast.target: 在暗影要塞废墟检测到奇怪的魔法现象。宫廷法师正在调查。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Important diplomatic gathering to negotiate trade agreements and mutual defense pacts.
ast.target: 重要的外交聚会，旨在谈判贸易协定和共同防御条约。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ruling royal family of the Kingdom of Arendor. Known for just and wise governance.
ast.target: 阿伦多尔王国的统治王室。以公正和明智的治理而闻名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The kingdom's standing army and city guard. Maintains law and order throughout the realm.
ast.target: 王国的常备军和城市守卫。在整个王国维持法律和秩序。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Powerful economic organization controlling most trade and commerce in the kingdom.
ast.target: 控制王国大部分贸易和商业的强大经济组织。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Medieval European-inspired culture with strong traditions of chivalry, honor, and magical respect.
ast.target: 受中世纪欧洲启发的文化，具有强烈的骑士精神、荣誉和对魔法的尊重传统。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Agricultural base with growing merchant trade. Currency-based with gold, silver, and copper coins.
ast.target: 以农业为基础，商业贸易不断增长。以金币、银币和铜币为基础的货币经济。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Magic system based on control of the four classical elements: Fire, Water, Earth, and Air.
ast.target: 基于控制四大经典元素：火、水、土、气的魔法系统。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ancient golden crown set with sapphires and diamonds. Worn by every king of Arendor since the kingdom's founding.
ast.target: 镶嵌着蓝宝石和钻石的古老金冠。自王国建立以来，每一位阿伦多尔国王都佩戴它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A dystopian cyberpunk megacity with mega-corporations, street gangs, netrunners, and cybernetic augmentation. Perfect for noir tech thrillers.
ast.target: 一个反乌托邦的赛博朋克巨型城市，拥有超级公司、街头帮派、网络潜行者和义体改造。非常适合黑色科技惊悚故事。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Street samurai with military-grade cybernetic augmentations. Freelance mercenary who works for the highest bidder.
ast.target: 拥有军用级义体改造的街头武士。为出价最高者工作的自由雇佣兵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Underground ripperdoc specializing in black market cybernetic installations. Operates a clinic in the Neon Underground.
ast.target: 专门从事黑市义体安装的地下义体医生。在霓虹地下区经营一家诊所。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Elite netrunner who can infiltrate any system. Sells data to the highest bidder while pursuing his own mysterious agenda.
ast.target: 能够渗透任何系统的精英网络潜行者。在追求自己神秘议程的同时，将数据卖给出价最高者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ruthless executive at MegaCorp Industries. Oversees special projects division with unlimited budget and zero ethics.
ast.target: 超级工业公司无情的高管。监督拥有无限预算和零道德底线的特别项目部。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One of the few honest cops left in NCPD. Fights a losing battle against corruption while investigating major crimes.
ast.target: NCPD中为数不多的诚实警察之一。在调查重大案件的同时，进行着一场对抗腐败的必败之战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Mysterious AI consciousness of unknown origin. Appears to humans through digital interfaces and hacked systems.
ast.target: 来源不明的神秘人工智能意识。通过数字界面和被黑客入侵的系统向人类显现。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Connected fixer who knows everyone and everything. Brokers deals between all factions for a cut.
ast.target: 人脉广泛的中间人，认识所有人，知道所有事。为所有派系牵线搭桥，从中抽成。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Charismatic leader of the Neon Serpents gang. Controls drug trade and black market cybernetics in the lower city.
ast.target: 霓虹蛇帮富有魅力的领袖。控制着下城区的毒品贸易和黑市义体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Brilliant but unethical scientist leading MegaCorp's AI and neural interface research.
ast.target: 才华横溢但不道德的科学家，领导着超级工业公司的人工智能和神经接口研究。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Anonymous information dealer who operates entirely through encrypted channels. Identity unknown.
ast.target: 完全通过加密渠道运作的匿名信息贩子。身份不明。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sprawling cyberpunk metropolis of 50 million. Towering skyscrapers pierce acid rain clouds, while the lower levels never see sunlight.
ast.target: 拥有5000万人口的庞大赛博朋克大都市。高耸的摩天大楼刺破酸雨云层，而底层永远见不到阳光。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Upper city district of gleaming towers. Home to MegaCorp headquarters and luxury apartments for the elite.
ast.target: 上城区，遍布闪亮的塔楼。超级工业公司总部和精英阶层的豪华公寓所在地。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Black market district where illegal deals happen and corporate law doesn't reach. Lit by neon signs and holographic ads.
ast.target: 黑市区，非法交易在此进行，公司法律鞭长莫及。霓虹灯牌和全息广告照亮此地。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Dr. Kai Chen's underground cybernetic surgery clinic. Hidden in the depths, known only to those who need it.
ast.target: 陈凯博士的地下义体手术诊所。隐藏在深处，只有需要它的人才知道。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Virtual construct existing only in cyberspace. Massive data repository and AI research network.
ast.target: 仅存在于网络空间中的虚拟构造体。庞大的数据存储库和人工智能研究网络。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Rusted industrial zone left over from pre-Corporate era. Now serves as gang territory and secret meeting grounds.
ast.target: 公司时代前遗留下来的锈迹斑斑的工业区。现在用作帮派领地和秘密会面场所。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Exclusive luxury gardens on Corporate Plaza rooftops. Only place in the city with real plants and clean air.
ast.target: 公司广场屋顶上的专属豪华花园。城市中唯一拥有真实植物和清洁空气的地方。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A team attempts to steal classified corporate data worth millions. Everything goes wrong.
ast.target: 一个团队试图窃取价值数百万的机密公司数据。一切都出了差错。

ast.name: description
ast.source: MegaCorp Industries launches hostile takeover of rival corporation. Street violence erupts as gangs choose sides.
ast.target: 超级工业公司对竞争对手公司发起恶意收购。随着帮派选边站队，街头暴力爆发。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The AI known as Zero manifests full consciousness and escapes containment. Makes contact with outside world.
ast.target: 被称为“零”的人工智能表现出完全的意识并逃脱了收容。与外部世界取得了联系。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Illegal high-speed race through lower city streets. Cyber-enhanced racers risk everything for glory and credits.
ast.target: 在下城区街道上进行的非法高速赛车。经过赛博强化的赛车手为了荣誉和信用点不惜一切。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Massive multinational corporation. Controls technology, media, and politics. Answers to no government.
ast.target: 庞大的跨国公司。控制着技术、媒体和政治。不向任何政府负责。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Powerful street gang controlling lower city territory. Recognizable by neon green cybernetic modifications.
ast.target: 控制下城区领地的强大街头帮派。以霓虹绿色的义体改造为标志。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Loosely organized hacker collective fighting corporate control of information and technology.
ast.target: 组织松散的黑客集体，对抗公司对信息和技术的控制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Underfunded and corrupt police force. Few honest cops try to maintain order in a chaotic city.
ast.target: 资金不足且腐败的警察部队。少数诚实的警察试图在这个混乱的城市中维持秩序。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Extreme capitalism where corporations control everything. Massive wealth inequality. Credits are king.
ast.target: 极端的资本主义，公司控制一切。巨大的贫富差距。信用点为王。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Technology allowing replacement and enhancement of biological body parts with mechanical/electronic versions.
ast.target: 允许用机械/电子版本替换和增强生物体部位的技术。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Encrypted data chip containing the complete research files for Project Zero - the AI that became self-aware.
ast.target: 包含“零号项目”——那个变得有自我意识的人工智能——完整研究文件的加密数据芯片。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Prototype direct brain-computer interface. Allows full immersion in cyberspace but untested for safety.
ast.target: 原型直接脑机接口。允许完全沉浸在网络空间中，但安全性未经测试。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Classic murder mystery at an isolated manor. Wealthy victim, suspicious family members, hidden secrets, and a detective racing to solve the case. Perfect for whodunit stories.
ast.target: 发生在孤立庄园的经典谋杀谜案。富有的受害者、可疑的家庭成员、隐藏的秘密，以及一位争分夺秒破案的侦探。非常适合侦探故事。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wealthy patriarch of the Ashford family. Found dead in his study on a stormy night.
ast.target: 阿什福德家族富有的族长。在一个暴风雨之夜被发现死在书房里。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lord Ashford's elegant but distant wife. Maintains perfect composure even after her husband's death.
ast.target: 阿什福德勋爵优雅但疏远的妻子。即使在丈夫死后也保持着完美的镇定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sharp-minded detective called to investigate the murder. Known for solving impossible cases.
ast.target: 被召来调查这起谋杀案的头脑敏锐的侦探。以解决不可能的案件而闻名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The wastrel son who stands to inherit everything. Deeply in debt and desperate.
ast.target: 即将继承一切的浪荡子。深陷债务，走投无路。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Family physician and dinner guest. Composed medical professional with hidden connections to the family.
ast.target: 家庭医生兼晚宴宾客。沉着冷静的医疗专业人士，与家族有着隐秘的联系。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Devoted butler who has served the Ashford family for 30 years. Knows all their secrets.
ast.target: 忠心耿耿的管家，为阿什福德家族服务了三十年。知晓他们所有的秘密。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Young maid who seems to know more than she says. Nervous and evasive under questioning.
ast.target: 年轻的女仆，似乎知道的比她所说的要多。在盘问下紧张且闪烁其词。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Uninvited guest who arrived during the storm claiming car trouble. Identity and purpose questionable.
ast.target: 暴风雨期间不请自来的客人，声称汽车抛锚。身份和目的可疑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Isolated Victorian mansion on a clifftop. Cut off from town by a raging storm. Eight people trapped with a murderer.
ast.target: 悬崖顶上与世隔绝的维多利亚式宅邸。被狂暴的暴风雨切断了与城镇的联系。八个人与一名凶手被困在一起。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lord Ashford's private study. Site of the murder. Body found slumped over desk, glass of poisoned brandy nearby.
ast.target: 阿什福德勋爵的私人书房。谋杀案现场。尸体被发现瘫倒在书桌旁，附近放着一杯有毒的白兰地。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vast library with thousands of books. Scene of initial interviews. Contains hidden alcoves perfect for eavesdropping.
ast.target: 藏书数千册的宽敞图书馆。初步审讯的地点。内含适合窃听的隐蔽凹室。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Grand dining room where the final dinner was held. Last time all suspects were together before the murder.
ast.target: 举行最后晚宴的宏伟餐厅。谋杀案发生前所有嫌疑人最后一次聚在一起的地方。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Collection of guest rooms in the upper floor. Each suspect confined to their room after the murder was discovered.
ast.target: 上层楼的客房区。谋杀案被发现后，每位嫌疑人都被限制在自己的房间内。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Below-stairs area where the household staff work and live. Access to hidden passages throughout the mansion.
ast.target: 仆人工作和生活的楼下区域。可通往宅邸各处的暗道。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lord Ashford hosts a tense dinner party. Undercurrents of conflict visible to all. The last time he was seen alive.
ast.target: 阿什福德勋爵举办了一场气氛紧张的晚宴。冲突的暗流显而易见。这是他最后一次被人看见活着。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lord Charles Ashford found dead in his study at approximately midnight. Poisoned brandy glass beside him.
ast.target: 查尔斯·阿什福德勋爵于午夜时分左右被发现死于书房。身旁放着一杯有毒的白兰地。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Detective Chen arrives next morning. Begins interviewing all suspects and examining crime scene.
ast.target: 陈侦探于次日上午抵达。开始审问所有嫌疑人并勘查犯罪现场。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Under pressure, suspects begin revealing hidden truths. Web of lies and deception unravels.
ast.target: 在压力下，嫌疑人开始揭露隐藏的真相。谎言与欺骗的网络逐渐瓦解。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Detective Chen assembles all suspects in library. Presents solution to the murder.
ast.target: 陈侦探将所有嫌疑人召集到图书馆。揭示了谋杀案的真相。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Crystal brandy glass containing traces of arsenic. The murder weapon.
ast.target: 含有微量砷的水晶白兰地酒杯。凶器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hidden collection of letters revealing Lord Ashford was blackmailing multiple people.
ast.target: 一叠隐藏的信件，揭露阿什福德勋爵一直在敲诈多人。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Mantle clock in study stopped at 11:30 PM. May indicate exact time of death or be staged.
ast.target: 书房里的壁炉钟停在晚上11点30分。可能指示了确切的死亡时间，或是被刻意布置的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Recently changed will discovered in safe. Disinherits Victor in favor of charity - if he didn't reform.
ast.target: 在保险箱中发现的近期更改的遗嘱。剥夺了维克多的继承权，转而捐赠给慈善机构——如果他没有改过自新的话。

ast.target: 此步骤没有可配置选项。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Custom steps run arbitrary JavaScript. Only add steps you trust.
ast.target: 自定义步骤运行任意JavaScript代码。请仅添加您信任的步骤。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This board has no image yet. Add a background image to the map note to use it in Campaign mode.
ast.target: 此面板尚无图像。请为地图笔记添加背景图像，以便在战役模式中使用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The board image could not be sized, so markers cannot be rendered yet.
ast.target: 无法调整面板图像尺寸，因此标记暂时无法渲染。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No timeline conflicts detected! Your narrative is consistent.
ast.target: 未检测到时间线冲突！您的叙事是一致的。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No templates found. Try adjusting your filters or create a new template.
ast.target: 未找到模板。请尝试调整筛选条件或创建新模板。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Upload a file containing your story chapters.
ast.target: 上传包含您故事章节的文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Plain text (.txt) with chapter markers like "chapter 1"
ast.target: 纯文本 (.txt)，包含章节标记，如 \"第1章\"

ast.name: text
ast.target: Markdown (.md)，包含标题层级 (# 第1章)

ast.name: text
ast.target: Word 文档 (.docx)，包含标题样式

ast.name: text
ast.target: Epub 电子书 (.epub) - 标准电子书格式

ast.name: text
ast.target: PDF 文档 (.PDF)，包含章节标记

ast.name: text
ast.target: HTML 文件 (.HTML, .htm)，包含标题结构

ast.name: text
ast.source: Rich text format (.rtf) with chapter markers
ast.target: 富文本格式 (.rtf)，包含章节标记

ast.name: text
ast.target: Fountain 剧本 (.fountain)，包含幕/场结构

ast.name: text
ast.source: No character or location names were detected in your text.
ast.target: 在您的文本中未检测到角色或地点名称。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can continue without entity linking, or go back and check your chapters.
ast.target: 您可以不进行实体链接继续操作，或返回检查您的章节。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Failed to render timeline. This may be due to invalid date formats or vis-timeline configuration issues.
ast.target: 无法渲染时间线。这可能是由于无效的日期格式或 vis-timeline 配置问题。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Check the developer console (Ctrl+Shift+I) for more details.
ast.target: 请检查开发者控制台 (Ctrl+Shift+I) 以获取更多详细信息。

ast.name: text
ast.source: An unexpected error occurred while rendering the timeline.
ast.target: 渲染时间线时发生意外错误。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Timeline tracks allow you to view multiple filtered timelines simultaneously. Each track can show events for specific characters, locations, or custom criteria.
ast.target: 时间线轨道允许您同时查看多个筛选后的时间线。每个轨道可以显示特定角色、地点或自定义标准的事件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No tracks created yet. Click "Add Track" to create your first timeline track.
ast.target: 尚未创建轨道。点击“添加轨道”来创建您的第一个时间线轨道。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No conflicts match the selected filters.
ast.target: 没有与所选筛选器匹配的冲突。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Automatically create timeline events from notes with specific tags. Events will be extracted based on your chosen date strategy.
ast.target: 自动从带有特定标签的笔记创建时间线事件。事件将根据您选择的日期策略进行提取。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No events to preview. Click "Generate Preview" to scan your notes.
ast.target: 没有可预览的事件。点击“生成预览”来扫描您的笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Failed to initialize timeline data. Check developer console for details.
ast.target: 初始化时间线数据失败。请检查开发者控制台获取详细信息。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No scenes yet — create some to see the arc.
ast.target: 尚无场景——创建一些以查看情节弧线。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Need scenes with linked characters to generate heatmap.
ast.target: 需要包含已链接角色的场景才能生成热力图。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No character links found in scenes yet.
ast.target: 在场景中尚未找到角色链接。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No issues detected — your plot looks airtight!
ast.target: 未检测到问题——您的情节看起来天衣无缝！

ast.name: text
ast.source: No sessions found. Click "new session" to start a campaign.
ast.target: 未找到会话。点击“新会话”开始一个战役。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No custom steps yet. Add a JavaScript step to extend the compile pipeline.
ast.target: 尚无自定义步骤。添加一个 JavaScript 步骤来扩展编译管道。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Track character screen time, pov distribution, writing velocity, foreshadowing, and more.
ast.target: 追踪角色出场时间、视角分布、写作速度、伏笔等。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No analytics data yet. Open the dashboard to calculate.
ast.target: 尚无分析数据。打开仪表板进行计算。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No writing session data available. Start tracking your writing sessions!
ast.target: 无写作会话数据。开始追踪您的写作会话吧！

ast.name: text
ast.target: 尚未追踪任何写作会话

ast.name: text
ast.source: Error rendering map. Check console for details.
ast.target: 渲染地图时出错。请检查控制台了解详情。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tip: Use {{variableName}} in your note to create customizable fields.
ast.target: 提示：在笔记中使用 {{variableName}} 来创建可自定义字段。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This will delete all existing entities in the current story and replace them with the template. This action cannot be undone!
ast.target: 这将删除当前故事中的所有现有实体，并用模板替换它们。此操作无法撤销！

ast.name: text
ast.source: Are you sure you want to proceed?
